text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, as I'm walking around the campus, I
hear boisterous hollering from the rooftops.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
I WANT TO EAT MORE CARROT ICE
CREEAAAM!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
I AM ACTIVELY RECRUITING HEROES! LET'S
TEAM UP AND BEAT THE BAD GUUUYS!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: PREEEEEEZ! PAY MORE ATTENTION TO MEEE!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Splendid! Your feelings are conveyed loud and
clear!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Okay, is there anyone else? Shout from the
rooftop to your heart's content!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Could the cause of the disturbance be...
choice_data_list: Bakushin O?! What on earth are you doing?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Looking around, I notice that the shouting has
drawn a large crowd.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I need to do something about this before it
devolves into a bigger mess, so I start running for
the rooftop.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Oh, Trainer! Why are you so out of breath?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Hehe! Thanks for listening!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
I'm also here to listen to and accept the
passionate feelings of the other students!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
We all have emotions that we keep bottled up,
hidden from anyone here in the academy.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
But! Sometimes you just feel like sharing and
letting everyone know how you feel!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
That's when I realized it! It feels good to yell what
you want in a place that attracts a lot of
attention!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
And when I listen to everyone's shouts of release,
it helps me channel my full power as a model
student!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
I once let out a shout while cleaning on the roof,
and it felt incredibly invigorating.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
I realized that yelling your lungs out somewhere
high up feels amazing!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
So that's what it was. I understand why you did it,
but it's not good to do something like that
without getting permission.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Members of the Student Council! Have you all
come to laud me for my outstanding service?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Nonsense! As if that's why we'd be here.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Your actions cause nothing but a disturbance.
Understood? Hurry and clear off.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
I-I object! Listening to what students have to say
isn't causing anyone trouble!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
It is the class representative's duty to heed the
call when necessary! I'm not leaving until I've
heard everyone out!
choice_data_list:
How about getting permission right here and
now?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I nudge her back to try and get her to leave,
but...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: I. SHAN'T. BUDGE.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
I can't leave until I've fulfilled my duty as class
representative and heard everyone out!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Hmmm... I suppose there's nothing wrong with
hearing what our students have to say.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
If you're talking about a suggestion box, we
already have one. I believe it to be an adequate
form of communication.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
It's nowhere near adequate! There are feelings
that can only be conveyed face-to-face!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Face-to-face? Certainly, there's logic in your
words... Sakura Bakushin O.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Y-yes?!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I can't permit this kind of gathering, but I do want
you to listen to what the students have to say
from now on.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Naturally, I myself also intend to listen more
closely to the student body as well.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Wowie! What an honor! To think I'd be praised by
the student council president like this!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
As expected of a model student! Verily, I am an
Umamusume born to be class representative!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Despite having to dissolve the gathering, Sakura
Bakushin O is burning with enthusiasm after
receiving a personal request from the student
council president.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I suggest that acting without permission may not
have been wise, but if she gets permission then
there'll be less issues in the future.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Heh heh, well, I'm off to the director's office then!
Full speed ahead, GO!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Sakura Bakushin O takes off in a flurry.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Sorry for keeping you all waiting! I got permission
from the director!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: What?!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
I believe her exact words were, "Approved!
Sounds like fun!"

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
She'll be picking the date and time and
emphasized that I'm to avoid causing trouble for
those around us, though...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Understood. You have my approval. There is no
problem, provided you adhere to the rules.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: President?!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
It's not a bad idea. It might prove a good
opportunity for us to participate too.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! Whatever your feelings entail, I'll accept
them head-on!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
If there's anything bothering the students, I'll do
my best to help find a solution!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Sigh... Just don't cause any major commotion.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sakura Bakushin O's proposal is accepted with
open arms. It seems that students with various
things on their minds have started to visit the
rooftop from time to time.
